Protein names: 23S rRNA (guanine(748)-N(1))-methyltransferase (EC 2.1.1.188) (23S rRNA m1G748 methyltransferase) (Tylosin-resistance methyltransferase RlmA(II))
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. RlmA family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=guanosine(748) in 23S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N(1)-methylguanosine(748) in 23S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42904, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10275, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10276, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:73542, ChEBI:CHEBI:74269; EC=2.1.1.188; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:10972803, ECO:0000269|PubMed:15046978};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates the guanosine in position 748 of 23S rRNA. Confers resistance to the macrolide antibiotic tylosine. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:10348045, ECO:0000269|PubMed:10972803, ECO:0000269|PubMed:15046978}.
